query: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') as shipping_status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY shipping_status LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') as shipping_status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM orders WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(rawData, '$."出貨狀態"') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY shipping_status LIMIT 20;
